'''rohakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yum|yum]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-h-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yum|yum]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rohakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rohakithi|rohakithi]] || [[word:rohakiji|rohakiji]] || [[word:rohakishi|rohakishi]] || [[word:rohakiki|rohakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rohakuthuthu|rohakuthuthu]] || [[word:rohakujuju|rohakujuju]] || [[word:rohakushushu|rohakushushu]] || [[word:rohakukuku|rohakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rohakuthu|rohakuthu]] || [[word:rohakuju|rohakuju]] || [[word:rohakushu|rohakushu]] || [[word:rohakuku|rohakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rohakufthuf|rohakufthuf]] || [[word:rohakufjuf|rohakufjuf]] || [[word:rohakufshuf|rohakufshuf]] || [[word:rohakufkuf|rohakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rohakethe|rohakethe]] || [[word:rohakeje|rohakeje]] || [[word:rohakeshe|rohakeshe]] || [[word:rohakeke|rohakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rohakothotho|rohakothotho]] || [[word:rohakojojo|rohakojojo]] || [[word:rohakoshosho|rohakoshosho]] || [[word:rohakokoko|rohakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rohakotho|rohakotho]] || [[word:rohakojo|rohakojo]] || [[word:rohakosho|rohakosho]] || [[word:rohakoko|rohakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rohakofthof|rohakofthof]] || [[word:rohakofjof|rohakofjof]] || [[word:rohakofshof|rohakofshof]] || [[word:rohakofkof|rohakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rohakÃŸfthÃŸf|rohakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rohakÃŸfjÃŸf|rohakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rohakÃŸfshÃŸf|rohakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rohakÃŸfkÃŸf|rohakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rohakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|rohakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rohakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|rohakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rohakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|rohakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rohakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|rohakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rohakÃŸfthÃŸf|rohakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rohakÃŸfjÃŸf|rohakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rohakÃŸfshÃŸf|rohakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rohakÃŸfkÃŸf|rohakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rohakÃŸfthÃŸf|rohakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rohakÃŸfjÃŸf|rohakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rohakÃŸfshÃŸf|rohakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rohakÃŸfkÃŸf|rohakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rohakÃḊthÃḊ|rohakÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:rohakÃḊjÃḊ|rohakÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:rohakÃḊshÃḊ|rohakÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:rohakÃḊkÃḊ|rohakÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rohakathatha|rohakathatha]] || [[word:rohakajaja|rohakajaja]] || [[word:rohakashasha|rohakashasha]] || [[word:rohakakaka|rohakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rohakatha|rohakatha]] || [[word:rohakaja|rohakaja]] || [[word:rohakasha|rohakasha]] || [[word:rohakaka|rohakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rohakafthaf|rohakafthaf]] || [[word:rohakafjaf|rohakafjaf]] || [[word:rohakafshaf|rohakafshaf]] || [[word:rohakafkaf|rohakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rohakasha|rohakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rohakshÃḋsha|rohakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rohakrosha|rohakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rohakmusha|rohakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rohakyasha|rohakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorohaknkshÃḋsha|gorohaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorohaknkrosha|gorohaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorohaknkmusha|gorohaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorohaknkyasha|gorohaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rohahakasha|rohahakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rohahakshÃḋsha|rohahakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rohahakrosha|rohahakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rohahakmusha|rohahakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rohahakyasha|rohahakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorohahaknkshÃḋsha|gorohahaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorohahaknkrosha|gorohahaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorohahaknkmusha|gorohahaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorohahaknkyasha|gorohahaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:rehÃḊkasha|rehÃḊkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rehÃḊkshÃḋsha|rehÃḊkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rehÃḊkrosha|rehÃḊkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rehÃḊkmusha|rehÃḊkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rehÃḊkyasha|rehÃḊkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorehÃḊknkshÃḋsha|gorehÃḊknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorehÃḊknkrosha|gorehÃḊknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorehÃḊknkmusha|gorehÃḊknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorehÃḊknkyasha|gorehÃḊknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rohfakasha|rohfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rohfakshÃḋsha|rohfakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rohfakrosha|rohfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rohfakmusha|rohfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rohfakyasha|rohfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorohfaknkshÃḋsha|gorohfaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorohfaknkrosha|gorohfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorohfaknkmusha|gorohfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorohfaknkyasha|gorohfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
